name: notebook-intelligence
description: Install, configure, and troubleshoot Notebook Intelligence for JupyterLab with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and troubleshoot the JupyterLab AI assistant.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex inspect Python and JupyterLab environments, install or upgrade Notebook Intelligence, configure supported model providers safely, and diagnose extension startup or connectivity problems.
defaultPrompt: Set up Notebook Intelligence in my current JupyterLab environment.
